ddls:
CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "category_character_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "char_id" INTEGER /* Character being mapped */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unicode_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "unicode_value" INTEGER /* Unicode value of the character */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Value of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programming_languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)
